llcFilesWith: Vermont Secretary of State (Assumed Business Name Registration)
soleProprietorFilesWith: Vermont Secretary of State (the same statewide assumed business name registration applies to individuals and sole proprietors)
feeBasis: The Secretary of State fee to register an assumed business name is $70.
renewalRule: An assumed business name registration must be renewed every five years to stay in force.
protectionNote: An assumed business name discloses the name a business trades under and grants no exclusive right to it.
searchNote: Registered assumed business names appear in the Secretary of State's online business search.
notes: Vermont registers assumed business names statewide with the Secretary of State (11 V.S.A. ch. 15). LLCs and sole proprietors alike file for $70; the registration lasts five years and must be renewed to stay in force. There is no publication requirement, and registration is disclosure rather than a trademark, so it grants no exclusive right.
